title: Change background color to pure black

requirements.text: Update the CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css to set the background color to pure black (#000000). Modify the --background variable in both light and dark theme sections to use 0% 0% 0% (OKLCH format for pure black).
acceptanceCriteria: The --background CSS variable is set to 0% 0% 0% in OKLCH format
Both light and dark theme sections reflect the pure black background
The application displays a pure black background across all screens

constraints: Maintain the existing OKLCH color format used throughout the CSS
Preserve all other color variables (red accent, foreground, etc.)
Do not modify any component files or layout structure
nonGoals: Changing any other colors beyond the background
Adjusting text colors or contrast ratios
